summary:
ADDICTIONS AND SPIRITUAL DELIVERANCE: Brandon addresses the national epidemic of addictions to pornography, pharmaceutical drugs such as opioids and fentanyl, and alcohol. He explains that these dependencies create major demonic strongholds but asserts that individuals can be set free through the power of Jesus. Brandon advises relying on biblical scriptures and taking daily communion to break these spiritual bondages and heal the mind from associated chemical and hormonal imbalances.

VISIONS OF PREPARATION AND GLOBAL TRIBULATION: Brandon recounts visions of fresh white roses wrapped in lace and a decorated olive wood hoopa, which he identifies as preparations for the marriage supper of the Lamb. Following this, he describes seeing into the tribulation period, witnessing smoke pouring from the inside of the Statue of Liberty and massive fires consuming New York City. He also visualizes the Vatican, Rome, and all of Europe burning, with immediate global rioting and pillaging occurring as a direct result of the rapture removing the church's spiritual prayer covering and global peace.

WARNING TO THE CHURCH AND THE END OF GRACE: Brandon references the biblical parable of the ten virgins to warn that lukewarm Christians who live compromised dual lifestyles will be left behind during the impending great shaking. He emphasizes that while God is currently extending the dispensation of grace out of mercy to allow for repentance, humanity is approaching a unique historical moment where God will definitively end time and close this period of grace.

PRAYERS FOR LEADERSHIP AND ECONOMIC STABILITY: Brandon outlines urgent prayer directives for political figures, specifically focusing on protecting President Trump from poisoning and various health issues, including blood clots and heart problems. He also calls for prayers for the mayor of New York and for the Supreme Court justices, urging them to rule in favor of tariffs to temporarily rescue the American economy from an impending 1930s-style financial crash and to buy time for a supernatural wealth transfer to fund global ministry efforts.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND PROTECTION: Brandon shares visions of severe terrorist attacks targeting mass transit, specifically the flooding of underwater subway tunnels in New York City and Chicago, resulting in mass casualties. He initiates prayers for the protection of domestic infrastructure and public gatherings, including airports, the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade, Black Friday shopping at the Mall of America and Walmart, New Year's Eve events, and various sporting events, asking for divine intervention against mass shootings and terrorist plots.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND DIVINE HEALTH: Brandon decrees a massive global spiritual revival across nations including South Korea, Australia, China, North Korea, Vietnam, and Iran, anticipating the greatest harvest of souls in history. He also claims divine health and protection for families against sicknesses like the coronavirus and the seasonal flu, while praying for the restoration of marriages, the return of prodigal children, and the safe release of those caught in human trafficking.
rawData: [November 09, 2025]-[Praying For people who just can’t seem to get freedom from addictions – it’s time for breakthrough]-[https://youtu.be/QaCdWCj2Nug]-[Hey, good evening, family. How are y'all doing today? Good morning, or wherever you are from. I know it's late, but I thought I would come on and pray with y'all for a little bit before you all go to bed and go over some of the things we saw last time so I don't skip today. I told Diana, "I feel in my heart to pray for a little bit." So I'm going to go on and pray with the family. Instead of just praying by myself, I'll pray with y'all and see what the Lord shows us. There's a lot going on in our beautiful nation. I talked to a lady today and I want to pray for her family. I told her I would, but I won't mention their names because I didn't ask for permission. One is dealing with some real heavy pornography issues, and another was dealing with an addiction to medications like opioids. Folks, it's an epidemic across this nation—more than what we realize, at least in my circle, until you start coming across people it's affecting majorly. It's tragic, but we know who is greater, and it's our God. We're going to pray for people tonight who have an addiction to pharmaceutical drugs. I really have compassion for them after you talk to folks and find out that their family is strung out on this stuff. It destroys lives. It starts out probably really simple with pain or whatever you're going through, and then your body gets addicted to this stuff and you don't know how to get off of it. It's the same problem with fentanyl and all these other things that come across the border, from oxycodone to Lortabs, whatever. I'm not really familiar with all the names, but I know there are a lot of people dealing with this who do not know how to get off of it. It's sad. Then you have people addicted to pornography, looking at bad stuff on the internet. It's so easily accessible in this generation, even more than when I was a teenager. It's not just teenagers; it's adults. It's become more grotesque with all these different sites and easy access to this stuff, and people are addicted and need help. I'm going to tell you, Jesus came to set you free. There's an expiration date to it. I truly believe that if we lean in and trust in the Lord and get into the Word concerning things like addictions, bondages, and strongholds—major strongholds—Jesus came to set you free. That's why I would encourage you to take communion every day, praying for your loved ones who are strung out on these drugs or alcohol. One of her kids was strung out on alcohol, and he's getting better. I believe it will continue—the manifestation of what they're believing for, for alcohol to be completely off this family. It's all addictions. The devil comes at you, and if you give him just a little bit, he'll push the door wide open and start to kill, steal, and destroy your life. You think it's just innocent, just a little soft porn, and the next thing you know, you're in something so deep you don't even realize it. It becomes live chats and all that other trash. I know there's a lot of the body of Christ that needs help. We're not here to shame you; we're here to help you. We want to pray for you. I love you and want to tell you that God has a plan for your life. It's not to shame you or beat you down and make you feel inadequate, like God can't use you. No, that's what the devil tries to make you feel like when you're addicted to these pills. It starts messing with your personality and your mind because you've opened up demonic doors, and it starts messing with the hormones of your mind and everything else. It's very serious. So we'll pray for them tonight, and we'll pray for anyone else on here who has those addictions and bondages—whether you're bound to pornography, alcohol, gambling, or whatever. I just feel in my heart to pray for all of you. Braden had the idea from watching some of Alex Jones's clips. Alex Jones does a long broadcast every day that goes for three or four hours. Braden said, "You know, Daddy, he takes those segments on each one of his broadcasts, takes the highlights, and just makes one video on X for 10 or 15 minutes and highlights that conversation so people don't get lost in it." He said, "So that's what I'm going to do. I'm going to take the highlight reel of your prayer sessions every time you pray. If it goes two or three hours, we'll just upload it and do it like Alex Jones does. We'll do 10-minute sections of the highlights of that prayer part. They can pray with you if they feel led to, and if not, they can move on to the next one. I'll split the video up over the course of a day or so and put little things in it and make it cool for them—maybe some graphics or whatever. Then we'll put it on each one of the channels, and if they don't want to spend time watching the whole thing, then that's on them." He said, "At least we can let the Holy Spirit move, and if the people want to criticize, they can go watch the small ones." I thought, "That's pretty smart, Braden." He thought that through, and I was really proud of that. He said, "Hey, Alex Jones did it, Daddy." I said, "Okay." So that's what we're going to do. We uploaded one of them. We have another one almost done about the roses. I saw a bunch of roses—all really tight-stem roses—this last time. It was beautiful how all of these roses, a bouquet of all white roses, were ready. They had this beautiful lace wrapped around them. You know how you can take tissue paper at the flower shop and wrap them in tissue paper or whatever, and it makes it like a really pretty thing for a homecoming queen, and they present it to the person? This was wrapped in lace—all beautiful lace—and these flowers were all so tightly closed. They were fresh roses, white as snow. They were so beautiful, tight roses. Then I saw the hoopa again. The Lord showed me that hoopa with all the tinsel and the beautiful lights and the beautiful things about this hoopa and all of the carvings of olive wood. The olive wood was all carved into this hoopa for the marriage supper. It was symbolic of the ceremony, and the Lord is showing us He's getting ready. It's symbolic. I don't know if we're all standing underneath a hoopa, folks; I don't really believe that's what He's saying. He's saying, "I'm coming. I'm coming." I'm getting ready for the bride. I'm getting ready for my church. I'm getting ready for my ekklesia. It's time for my church to wake up. As I was looking at the roses and the preparations for this feast—what I told you about the tables and all the ceremony—I truly believe God is going to celebrate us as we come home. As I was looking at all the attention to detail, how everything was polished and the varnish on the wood was so beautiful, all the beautiful leaves and the extensions on that hoopa were so perfect and designed for celebration. As I was looking at it, you could get lost in all of it. But then the Lord allowed us, as we continued to pray, to see into the tribulation. I saw holes in the Statue of Liberty. I saw massive sections of what looked like steel that had been pulled back and holes in the side of the Statue of Liberty with smoke. It looked like it was burning, but you can't burn metal. For whatever reason, smoke was coming out from the inside of the Statue of Liberty. Not from the outside in, but from the inside out. Whatever was burning was on the inside because smoke was coming up, and there were soot and dark smudges all on the side of the statue. I could see the base of her feet and everything was dark with black marks, but there were holes all in the side of it. As I was looking, I was able to see a view from afar, from the ocean in, and I could see all of New York burning. It looked like something out of a bad movie. There were buildings there, but there was smoke like when you light a bunch of tires on fire. That's the kind of smoke that was coming out of New York. There was so much fire and smoke. As I was looking across America, at the rioting and the pillaging of this nation, I truly believe I was looking into the tribulation. Even looking into Europe, I saw the Vatican on fire. I could see Europe was on fire. Rome—it was all fires. If you go back to what I told you all, the moment the rapture happens, when the church and the covering is taken away, that prayer covering is gone. When the church is removed, there's a peace that we experience every day of our lives. We wake up and have a sense of peace without even realizing it. There's a sense of a prayer covering from the church because we bring the salt and the light to this earth. As we are here in this earth interceding for the nations—that's why we have this channel. 2,500 of you right now are watching. We're prayer warriors. We're hungry. We're thirsty. We're the ones that bring that light into the darkness. I truly believe as the church is removed, based on what I experienced when I was allowed to see the tribulation with the Lord, that prayer covering is removed. And there are Christians left here who are lukewarm. I'm telling you, there are lukewarm Christians. People say, 'Oh, Brandon, I don't believe that.' No, I'm telling you. The Bible says there were ten virgins. Five had their lamps full of oil and five didn't. All of them knew the bridegroom was coming, but five were expecting him and had their lamps full and ready, and five didn't. They were all looking for him, but some had an earnest expectation and were prepared spiritually while the others weren't. I believe that's a representation of the church. There will be people left because they don't have their lamps full of oil. I truly believe the parable of the virgins is talking about what's about to take place. The Bible says he would rather you be hot or cold, but if you're lukewarm, he'll spew you out of his mouth. He's looking for the ones right now who are hot for him—the ones right now who are on fire, who are all-in. But for a good percentage of you, you like living on the fence. You like living with one foot in the world and one foot in the church. You may sleep around, have a little sex on the weekend, party, and drink while not being married. You're sleeping around on your wife or your husband. You have an open marriage. You have all these things going on, and you think you're okay with the Lord, but you're so mistaken. He would rather you be hot or cold, but you're lukewarm. Some of you are so cold you could freeze. I'm not trying to be funny. I'm trying to tell you there is a time coming, and what's about to take place is a great shaking. The church is not ready. I keep going over this because it's on me to warn you. If I were in that position where I didn't hear it all the time from the Holy Spirit echoing inside of me, I would want somebody to tell me even if I didn't tune in. As I saw the fires burning across Rome, Italy, and France—I'm telling you, when I watched the tribulation with the Lord, the moment the rapture took place, everything was on fire. People were rioting and pillaging and acting like fools in just a matter of seconds because that covering was gone. For the first time in their lives, they woke up and didn't feel that peace. They didn't have that sense of peace and joy they always had and never realized they possessed. Even the most wretched sinner, even a murderer or a rapist, still feels it and they don't even realize it. But you as a Christian feel it even more because he dwells on the inside of you. As the world wakes up to the reality that tribulation has begun, there's a vast void, and people burn things and act crazy in a matter of seconds. It's like a light switch comes on and they realize that something is very different. I tell you all this because of what I saw in the visions concerning our prayer time two days ago. It echoed inside of me to pray for the ones who are blinded. The Bible says that Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbelievers, and according to Ephesians, we pray for the eyes of their understanding to be enlightened. If you have unsaved loved ones—sons, daughters, husbands, wives, grandparents, aunts, or uncles—I believe the prayers of the righteous avail much. I believe we're going to see our unsaved loved ones come to the saving knowledge of Jesus Christ before a shaking comes. I truly believe this because of how merciful God is, and how he keeps saying, 'I extended time. I don't want anyone to perish, but all to come to repentance.' He said, "This is the first time in history that it is Me that makes the choice to end time." As a human being, you go through your whole life and I give you an opportunity. It's appointed unto man once to die and after that the judgment. It's appointed unto all of us once to die, but it's our choice whether we accept Jesus Christ as our Lord and personal savior. But this is the first time in history that God says, "It's done. It's time. Time's over. It's no more, son. Go get them." This is the first time that He made the choice. It's over. Time's up. Everybody has a point in time in life. Usually, you could have 80 years. On average, it's 60 or 70 years. But at least you had time in your life. You had a choice. Whether you saw an ad on TV for a church and you felt that tugging, it says, "No man comes to the Father unless he's drawn by Him." But I guarantee you, because of the scripture that God so loved the world that He gave His one and only Son, that whosoever would believe in Him should not perish but all come to repentance. He doesn't want anybody going to hell. In fact, He didn't make hell for humans. He made hell for the devil. You go there because you choose it. But when this dispensation of grace comes to an end, that's the timeframe when God says it's done. He's so merciful. He keeps giving time. He keeps saying, "Brandon, call out. Call again. Give them another opportunity to accept my Son. Tell them today that I love them. Tell them today that they need to repent and change." I believe every single person that Jesus healed in the Bible wasn't a believer. They weren't born-again believers. They were sinners. He came to save that which was lost. But His grace was sufficient enough that even while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us. I butchered that scripture. My deaconess here can look out for me. "Even when we were yet sinners, Christ died for us," I believe is what it says exactly. But I want to say this: He died for every single one of you, even knowing that you were a sinner. He loved you. But He healed those that were all of them. The one with the issue of blood, look at them. They weren't all Christians. They were unsaved. But whenever He laid hands on them and they got healed, He would say, "Go and sin no more, lest a worse thing come upon you." He required them to change. Even after He laid hands on them or touched them, He imparted grace. He was merciful. He said, "Go and sin no more." He didn't say, "Keep doing what you're doing. You live the way you want to. My grace is sufficient for you. Just keep going and do how you want to. I'll heal you by my mercy, but you can live the way you want to live." No, that's not what He said. He told every single one of them they had to repent. Even John the Baptist said, "Repent. Turn. Turn." You must know Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior. Unless a man is born again, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God. That's what the word says. It's appointed unto man once to die, and after that the judgment. I'm telling you, to be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. That's what the Lord says to us in His word. But I want to tell you this: you must repent. You must change and turn from your wicked ways. You're running out of time. You don't understand that it's appointed unto man once to die. No one is promised tomorrow. The very shoes you put on your feet today to go to work or Walmart, the undertaker might be taking them off. You might have a tragic car accident on the way home. You just never know. I want you to be assured inside of your heart that if you were to die today, where would you spend eternity? If you were to die tonight in your sleep, where would you spend eternity? You might be 80 years old and you can't sleep right now and you're watching this. This might be your last moments on this earth, but you don't know Him. That should scare the crap out of you. Do you understand? To be that close to spending eternity in hell if you don't know Jesus Christ is the biggest mistake you'll ever make. You must know Him, my friend. But not only that, He must know you. There are a lot of people that claim they know Him. The five virgins who thought they knew the bridegroom. "Oh look, he's coming. Can we borrow some of your oil?" They weren't prepared for themselves. They thought they could mooch off of somebody else's experience. They thought they could experience the glory from somebody else's experience and borrow their oil. But it's not somebody else's experience that's going to get you there. It's not your mama's experience, your dad's, or your grandma's experience. It's not their oil. It's not the Holy Ghost inside of them that's going to get you there. You can't rely on their experience to get you to heaven. Do you know Him? I have such an urgency to tell you tonight: you must know Him. As I saw the flowers, as I see the wedding feast, as I see the buildings burning, and He keeps showing me this over and over again, and I see the Statue of Liberty with huge holes in it and the Vatican burning, and I see all the things the Lord shows me, it's always just a couple years out, sometimes ten. Sometimes it's months, but it usually comes to pass in some way. There is always the possibility it is altered by prayer. That's why I told you: people say, "Brandon, you're a prophet." I'm an intercessor. I intercede for the nations. Most people go, "What does that mean?" Well, I'm a watchman. I tell you, I feel like the Lord's instructed me to tell you what I see coming. And if it proves to be accurate, fine. Keep listening. If not, you say I'm flaky, then don't watch. You can click it off just like you do anything else. But I just wanted to tell you tonight, Jesus loves you and He has a plan for your life. I don't know when He's coming. No man knows the day or the hour. But I'm going to tell you this: I have an urgency inside of my spirit as I pray for President Trump, as I see him drinking things. And the Lord says, "Pray for him that they don't poison him. Pray for him that they don't poison his food. Pray for him if they're trying to figure out a way to hurt this man." Things fly by his ears. How many times from the golf course to Pennsylvania has there been something that has been stopped that we don't even know about? They haven't even told you because they're not going to announce everything. I'm sure of the threats. But I know that it's our job as the church to pray for our leaders—the governors, our mayors, our people of power. Even now, you people of New York, you must pray for that man in New York. And I know that will be very hard to do as he is as blatant as a communist. God help him. Muslim evil, evil, evil man. And you voted him into power. And like the Lord said, he lied to y'all. You'll learn he'll lie to y'all. I pray for God to shake this nation. But now you pray for him to have a radical visitation from Jesus. It's required of you to pray for your leaders. The Bible says to pray for those who are in authority over us. Pray for them. You all voted them in, so you're going to have to pray for them now. I pray for President Trump all the time. I pray for his family. I pray for his marriage. The Lord told me to pray for his marriage. There are things there that needed prayer. He tells me all kinds of things to pray for that man. I pray for his sons. I pray for their marriages. I pray for their children. It's a continual prayer covering because it's what God's required us to do. It's easier because when the Lord speaks to me specifically about the man, that he must finish his race, he must finish what God's called him to do because he's part of the end times. I saw his buildings being attacked again. I see him on fire. I see attacks coming against him. I see attacks against the White House. I see attacks against all kinds of things. The Lord keeps—that's why I come on here and I tell you all this. You must pray. I prayed against the Super Bowl. But I'll go over what I saw, okay? I saw New York City. I saw the subway system. I saw them blow up the underwater tunnels and they flooded them with water, and many people were dead within a couple of minutes. All the mass transit in New York City—they're planning to attack it. That's what I saw. And it wasn't just in one place; it was in five major cities. And I've already told you those cities. If you're a student and somebody who follows me, you'll know who those five major cities are. That's what I was trying to tell you all to pray about. But a lot of times when you bring things on there that are that heavy across the public platform, I question it. I go, 'Well, Lord, should I say that or not?' But I tell these things because, you know, maybe you'd be one that rides the subway. But it was flooded, and all the water flooded in within just seconds. And there was no way for the emergency crews to get to the people. They were drowned. Millions of gallons of water flooded every one of them. It was the same in Chicago. It was the same in these areas. I don't know how it happens, but I saw water. So, is it a big deal? Yes. But is it something that I don't want to talk about on this platform very often? No. There's a lot of things that I see that I don't feel comfortable talking about, but I tell you if I feel led to. I told you I was bold enough to tell you about Donald Trump's food. So I just keep pushing. You know, it's not easy to come on here and tell you I see a president's food being poisoned. I see a president... I don't know what I'm seeing, but I feel like this is what's going to happen. And we must pray for him. Do you know how hard it is sometimes to come on here and say that kind of stuff? But I do it. After it was over, the devil, I'm telling you, tried to rake me over the coals: 'You idiot, you should never say that.' Talking over and over in my mind. I said, 'Shut up, Satan.' That's when I know it's accurate. That's whenever I know even more that it's accurate—whenever he comes to try to torment me because he doesn't want the effectual prayers of the righteous to avail much. So we pray for the president. We pray for his children. We pray for his health. We pray for his heart. We pray for his legs. We pray for his arteries, for strokes, for blood clots. And we pray over our nation that they do not keep this government shut down before Thanksgiving because mass chaos in the airports will be there for the Thanksgiving holidays. And I saw a strategic plot concerning the airways for the holiday season, betting that they will not open our government. And I even saw how it was created. And the Lord said to me, 'Pray.' So I do. I do my job, and I'm thankful for every single 4,300 of you that come on here and pray. Pray over our airways for the FAA. Is that right? FAA? That's the people... TSA. Thank you, TSA. Pray for the TSA that they show up. They're not getting paid right now, some of them. And I specifically saw Atlanta. Pray over Atlanta airport. Pray over Chicago airport. Pray over Washington D.C.'s airport and Boston's airport. Pray over these people that they're overwhelmed and people aren't showing up for work because we have a government that is absolutely goofy, not even opening up things and bringing security and safety. They had to stop a thousand flights today. A thousand flights were cancelled and I thought, 'Wow, how much more for in the next two weeks, three weeks?' We must open our government back up and we must get people back to work and we must pray for the Supreme Court justices. The Lord said this is not an option. The Supreme Court justices will rule in the favor of the tariffs. We will see this for helping our economy. He said, 'Don't,' because I was like, 'Lord, what if it doesn't?' He said, 'Failure is not an option. You must pray for the hearts of them to go with this, for if it does not, the American economy is in trouble. This is the rescue plan.' And I just pray. I saw him paddling with all his heart. He's sweating. And it was symbolic. He's trying to help us because I told you we were already at the point of no return concerning the finances, but he's keeping it afloat. This is not something that's going to stop it forever. It's just buying you time. A 1930s-style crash is coming eventually. People get so mad about that. 'He's saying all this stuff.' Listen, let the elevator go to the top. Look at the deficit of this nation. We're 40 trillion dollars in the hole. How much credit card debt is over the average American person? And we already know what the Bible says, that there's a beast system that's rising, a one-world order. That's what the Bible says. So, we already know what the Bible says is coming. And if you truly believe we're in the last days, we're right at the edge of this. But God said, 'I'm giving you a little time for the church to bring in the finances for the great harvest that I'm wanting to come in. It will cost money.' Well, it's not—'It's just free, brother, to have it.' You've never run a church then. That shows how ignorant some people are. 'We don't need money to do that.' Are you kidding me? Whenever I worked for a megachurch, our electricity bill for that church in the summer, because it was so hot, was $17,000 a month just to keep the air on. The water bill was thousands because everybody wanted to flush the toilet, and food and water and things like that for activities. If they ordered pizza, it was thousands. But you don't need money? And it's like, do you understand? It costs money. So, we're believing God for supernatural funds for the end times. That's what you're believing for. You need to. It's not just us four and no more; you should be believing for your church to be paid off so that your pastor doesn't have stress over the top of him where he goes, 'Man, I don't know how we're going to make it if the economy crashes.' Because guess what? They're not going to be merciful on the megachurches that have notes on their buildings and they can't pay because people aren't paying their tithes. So, we need to believe God for supernatural money to pay off this stuff so that they don't have all that stress on them. I believe in 'owe no man anything but to love him.' So, we need to believe for the supernatural extra. Don't go into debt. Debt makes you a slave to the lender, and it's terrible. So, you do the best you can. But I believe God is exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think. It's the same thing when it comes to everything; I'm always believing God for a creative idea to bring it in. Show me. If you show these people creative ideas and inventions, you can show me. I messed up. I went off on the road telling you about the salvation altar call, and I went off on that other trail, and that was not the Holy Spirit to do that at that moment. If you're watching this and you felt the pulling on your heart and Jesus was tugging at you, I apologize. I apologize to you. I messed up. If you're here right now and that tugging was on your heart and you felt it and you said, 'Brandon, I would just like to accept Jesus Christ as my Lord and personal savior right now,' I told you it is appointed for man once to die and after that judgment. But if you've never accepted Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior and you feel that stirring on the inside of you—you felt it earlier and me being insensitive to the Holy Spirit right then—I apologize. But I want to give you an opportunity before I move on. If you've never experienced Jesus Christ and confessed him as your Lord, tonight's your night. I want you right now to get serious about Jesus. He's standing at your door and he's knocking at your heart. All the things I told you about the tribulation, all the things I've told you about the marriage supper, I want you to make a choice tonight. Either way, you're making a choice. If you don't choose him, you're still making a choice. But I want you to choose the right decision. Make the right choice, make the right decision, and accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior. And if you're here tonight and you've never accepted the Lord or you used to know him and you're living in sin, you've backslidden, you're not living right, and you're watching this right now, I want you to make a choice. I want you to say in the comment section right now: 'I want to be saved. I want to be saved. I need Jesus and I want to be saved.' I'm asking the Lord to forgive me tonight. I need help. I've been strung out on drugs, I'm strung out on pornography, and I'm strung out on these things. You have all these things you're going through, but tonight's your night and you want to be free. You want help. We're going to pray for that. Also, you may be strung out on drugs or pills, prescription drugs, but you're here tonight and you're saying, 'I need help. Would you please pray for me?' Just say in the comment section, 'I need prayer tonight. I want somebody to pray for me. I've been strung out on drugs, sex, pornography, and alcohol. I just need somebody to pray for me tonight.' There's two categories, but tonight's your night and you're here and you just need prayer or you need to be saved. Type 'two' if you want to be saved.
